The '''Tapani Imperial Hotel''' was located in the Commercial district of [[Estalle Island]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. It was a very luxurious hotel but was not as exclusive as the [[Grand Royal Hotel]], also located on Estalle Island. Getting a room at the hotel was usually a matter of being able to afford the outrageous prices, although the rooms were normally fully booked during [[Capital Season]].

The Tapani Imperial Hotel typically catered for high-ranking [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] and [[megacorp]] executives.
